title: carex siderosticta subsp. pilosa
intro: Carex siderosticta subsp. pilosa, also known as the hairy-leaved sedge, is a subspecies of the Carex siderosticta plant, a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Carex siderosticta subsp. pilosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some traditional practices, it is also used in combination with other herbs to create medicinal preparations.
